title: Blind Color Mixer
description: An interactive, exploration-based color matching puzzle utility that challenges human sensory perception and chromatic intuition. The system displays a random baseline target color block alongside a real-time adjustable user mixture canvas. Equipped with three traditional horizontal input range sliders representing Red, Green, and Blue channels (0 to 255), the app completely conceals all numerical trackers and scale labels, requiring players to blend color coordinates relying exclusively on optical feedback.
